response.justification: Despite 19 years of solid full-stack engineering experience, the candidate lacks the core specialization this role demands. The position is explicitly for 'Specialized Software (AI Strategy)' with a focus on technical innovation in AI; the resume shows minimal AI expertise, no demonstrated AI products, and no strategic or director-level advisory experience. Recent exposure to MCP and agent infrastructure is encouraging but insufficient for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: 19 years of versatile full-stack engineering across multiple domains and platforms
Demonstrated founder mentality through GISCollective, building open-source platform serving real users
Track record of knowledge sharing and mentoring through workshops, talks, and Refactoring Dojos
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise; current AI exposure limited to recent infrastructure work at re:cinq
Generalist engineer without focused progression toward AI or cloud architecture specialization
No evidence of director-level strategic advising, customer engagement, or product vision work
